description: B2 / FGAP-068 — samples catalog discovery (SCOPE B). Two coupled parts: (1) add OPTIONAL relation_type endpoint-kind metadata source_kinds[]/target_kinds[] (wildcard '*') to the config relation_types model + author all 27 onto samples/conception.json + presence-gated edge endpoint-kind validation in validateProject (closes the live wrong-kind-edge hole; tracked as FGAP-086); (2) the dual-surface samples-catalog discovery surface — library samplesCatalog() (package-intrinsic, reads bundled samples/, conception ENRICHED per-kind with title/description/shape + applicable relation_types/invariants/lenses + top-level registries) reusing a schemaInfo→schemaInfoFromPath refactor; Pi tool read-samples-catalog; CLI scripts/orchestrator/read-samples-catalog.ts; package.json files +samples/ (publish-bug fix) + ./samples-catalog export (closes FGAP-068). 5-commit sequence per plan. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md ACTIVE section.
acceptance_criteria: config.schema.json (both loaded copies) relation_types items accept optional source_kinds[]/target_kinds[] (wildcard '*'); version 1.2.0->1.3.0; .project loadConfig still validates (no MigrationFn)
all 27 conception.json relation_types carry correct source_kinds/target_kinds per the plan mapping table
schemaInfo delegates to new schemaInfoFromPath(absPath,name) with zero caller breakage

samplesCatalog(opts?) returns 15 enriched kinds + top-level registries; per-kind relation_types resolved via source/target_kinds incl. wildcard; invariants via block; lenses via target; kind-filter + unknown-kind-warning; null title/description/shape surfaced as warning
validateProject endpoint-kind check fires on wrong-kind edge WITH metadata, SILENT without (gate protects frozen .project), wildcard accepts any
Pi tool read-samples-catalog + CLI read-samples-catalog.ts (cwd-less) both thin over samplesCatalog; package.json files +samples/ + exports +./samples-catalog

build/check/test green; samples-catalog.test.ts covers wildcard+alias+invariants+lenses+filter+endpoint-check+adversarial(non-existent-kind warning, conception-vs-config AJV guard); runtime demo via CLI; skills regen
notes: Foreground Write agent for source per feedback_no_adhoc_dev; orchestrator runs all npm/tsx/git. Closes FGAP-068 + FGAP-086. B2 of the in-pi tool-surface program.
